description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the docker:latest image with the docker:dind service. Define stages build, test, promote, deploy_qa, deploy_stg, and deploy_prod, and a global before_script that runs `echo "Installing docker-compose to run unit, integration and acceptance tests using real Redis and PostgreSQL"`, `apk add --update python py-pip python-dev && pip install docker-compose`, `docker version`, and `docker-compose version`. Add a build job in the build stage that echoes "Build and test apps" then runs `docker-compose up --build -d`. Add an acceptance_test job in the test stage that echoes "Running acceptance tests at profiles_api app", runs `docker-compose up -d`, and executes `docker-compose exec -T profiles_api mvn clean package -Dtest=**.acceptance.**.*Test clean package`. Add a create_tag_and_promote job in the promote stage that echoes "Step to create new tag and promote to QA env". Add deploy_qa, deploy_stg, and deploy_prod jobs in their respective stages that each echo a fake deployment step to QA, Stage, and Production. No caches, artifacts, or conditional rules are defined.
